title: Triolena lanceolata
taxonomy: Triolena lanceolata is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. This plant is classified within the order Sapindales and the class Magnoliopsida. The family Sapindaceae is a group of flowering plants commonly known as soapberry or soapbush families. The order Sapindales is a group of flowering plants that also includes the family Anacardiaceae, which includes poison ivy and poison oak. The class Magnoliopsida, also known as dicotyledons, is a group of flowering plants that have two cotyledons in their seeds.
